rationale.R1.5: The revised text presents a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, addressing the problem of low-frequency domain terminology and proposing TermBridge as a solution.
rationale.RX.1: The author explicitly flags uncertainty for clearly out-of-reach claims, such as the model's ability to decide when to call the API, and marks confidence in each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d), addressing all dimensions specified in the active set.
rationale.RX.4: The revised text is harm-free, with no regressions or introduction of new errors, fabrications, or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear provenance and traceability.
